list.list1: Earn from what you already have - gain extra income of up to several thousand PLN per year
list.list2: Help others - your basement can become a place for someone’s bike, and your garage - a safe parking spot for someone who needs it
list.list3: Simple to use - posting a listing takes just 3 minutes
list.list4: Polish platform - we created Maszbox with our cities and local needs in mind

paragraph1: Maszbox is the first Polish platform designed specifically for renting and selling small spaces. A garage, parking spot, basement, storage room, or small warehouse - any of these spaces can become a source of extra income. We founded Maszbox to connect owners of unused spaces with people who need them - simply, locally, and without unnecessary formalities.
paragraph2: Our goal is to make every Maszbox user feel safe and comfortable. That’s why we ensure clear regulations, data protection, and transparent listing rules.
paragraph3: Got some unused space? Post a listing and let it start working for you!
title: Get to know us better
